steps.title: Identify the special triangle
steps.content: The triangle has angles $30^\circ$, $60^\circ$, and $90^\circ$. In a $30$-$60$-$90$ triangle, the hypotenuse is twice the side opposite the $30^\circ$ angle.

steps.title: Use the hypotenuse
steps.content:
The hypotenuse is $QR=8$, and $PQ$ is opposite the $30^\circ$ angle. Therefore,
$$2(PQ)=8$$

steps.title: Find the short side
steps.content: Divide by $2$ to get the length of $PQ$. The answer is 4.
